## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Jason Shuman (Primary Venture Partners) to explore potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company (fwd.digital) has rapidly grown to $1M ARR in 5 months, offering AI-enhanced marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Jason's firm (Primary Ventures) manages $1.1B, specializing in seed-stage investments with a unique "impact team" model](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in potential collaborations, including workshops for Primary's portfolio companies](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Discussed the power of AI-driven workflows in marketing, content creation, and business development](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)

## Topics

### Company Backgrounds and Recent Developments

  - [Marcel: Founded fwd.digital, leveraging AI for marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
    
      - [Grew to $1M ARR in 5 months with 20 clients and 70% margins](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
      - [Notable clients include Ramp, Reddit, and Hagen](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
      - [Focuses on AI-enhanced content creation, SEO, and marketing workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)

  - [Jason: Partner at Primary Venture Partners](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
    
      - [Firm manages $1.1B, largest seed fund in New York](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Unique model with specialized impact team (35 people) offering go-to-market, recruiting, and finance support](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
      - [25% of deals have become unicorns, 90% raised Series A](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

### AI-Driven Marketing and Growth Strategies

  - [Marcel demonstrated various AI workflows for:](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
    
      - [Competitor analysis and keyword clustering](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
      - [Content generation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
      - [Persona profiling and outbound email creation](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [Meeting follow-ups and client research](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)

  - [Key advantages of fwd.digital's approach:](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
    
      - [Combines AI automation with expert human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
      - [Rapidly scalable content creation (e.g., city-specific articles)](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
      - [Significant cost reduction (e.g., $0.10/word vs. $1/word) while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)

### Potential Collaborations

  - [Jason expressed interest in fwd.digital's services for:](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
      - [His portfolio companies (proposing a group intro call)](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
      - [An AI growth engine project he's incubating for home service providers](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [Marcel offered to:](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
      - [Host a workshop for Primary's portfolio companies](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
      - [Provide insights and support based on fwd.digital's experiences with various clients](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
      - [Explore ways to assist Primary Ventures directly](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to connect Marcel with Vinny (CEO of incubated AI growth engine project)](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Jason to coordinate with his chief of staff to organize a group call with portfolio companies](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
  - [Marcel to add Jason to a Slack connect channel for easier communication](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)
  - [Marcel to send Jason information (and discount) for an upcoming workshop](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
  - [Plan for an in-person meeting in New York to discuss AI workflows in more depth](https://fathom.video/share/Uq9Fcx1GosxyV4LWBpMjRg4o74CgPedz?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
